SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-06-2001, OFF CALENDAR

SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MR OSMAN, IND/DBA LES JOULINS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ICE MACHINE INCORPORATED IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LES JOULINS INC THE CLAIM IS AMENDED TO REFLECT THE CORRECT DEFENDANT LES JOULINS, INC. "MR. OSMAN", IND & DBA LES JOULINS IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
